title: Glasgow, Scotland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Glasgow, Scotland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Glasgow is a city in Scotland with a population of 635,640. Scotland’s largest city known for its art scene, friendly locals, and some of the most affordable urban living in the UK.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
